requirements.title: v8.0 direction is runtime-backed and Council-approved
requirements.acceptance_boundary: direction review, role outputs, team output, and Council review identify the bounded first v8.0 slice

requirements.title: v8.0 direction preserves externalization boundaries
requirements.acceptance_boundary: direction excludes autonomous provider execution, secrets, billing, deploy, production writes, and semantic truth claims

forecast.estimated_token_cost_range: direction complete; implementation handled by TASK-100
forecast.forecast_boundary: direction forecast is not implementation or release readiness proof

not_proven: Coverage proves the direction task is represented and bounded, not that TASK-100 implementation or external execution is complete.
